title: Pink Rose Essential Oil Diffuser Blend by Aromafume | 1 x 30ml / 1 fl oz | Floral & Woody Scent for Romance, Sensuality & Good Vibrations | Rose Aromatherapy Oil | Vegan & Cruelty-Free
features: Product Contents: 1 x 30ml / 1 fl oz Essential Oil Bottle
Diffuse for: Romance, Sensuality & Good Vibrations
Scent Profile: Pink Rose, White Rose & Rosewood

How to Use: Aromafume’s Essential Oil can be used with both electric and candle-based diffusers. Fill your diffuser with the appropriate amount of water, add 8–10 drops of oil, and light it up. Take a deep breath... and let the aroma fill your heart and space.
Key Benefits: The deep floral aroma is ideal for prayer, meditation & self-care rituals. Creates a romantic and comforting atmosphere. Infuses your space with positivity. 100% Vegan & cruelty-free.
description: Aromafume’s Pink Rose Essential Oil is a romantic floral blend crafted to awaken the senses and elevate your mood. Made with Pink Rose, White Rose, and Rosewood, this soft yet deep aroma brings a sense of warmth, sensuality, and emotional connection, perfect for prayer, self-love rituals, or simply setting a comforting tone in your space.
